title: A Sleepy Ravenclaw and Slytherin
summary: Y/N is a typical student who studies like they should and passes their core classes easily enough. Learns quickly and grasps skills other works years for. But it takes practice and focus to do these things with an air of ease. So much of it has burnt energy her frail body struggles to keep up with. Due to this constant exhaustion, she’s collected the nickname “The Sleepy Ravenclaw” from her peers over the last couple years. Now a fifth year, she’s just as tired and just as avoidant of others attention. Friendly enough to others but mostly known to keep solely the company of her twin sister. It’s not that she doesn’t want to make friends, nor that she lacks a yearning of friendships, it’s just easier for everyone to stay at arms length. Even the girls younger brother generally stays away most of the time. Without their overbearing mother, she has little patience with the younger Gryffindor and his friends bad decisions. The Hufflepuff in her sister an easier aura to mellow with. So, she’s gradually come to the acceptance that one persons enough.
